completed_tasks.name: CI Blockers — typecheck and lint pass
Worker live, all 13 D1 migrations applied, v2.0.0 confirmed
VS Code Extension docs page + missing docs

blockers.description: CF_API_TOKEN not set as GitHub Actions secret — Worker auto-deploy via CI not wired up
blockers.workaround: Manual deploy works fine via `npx wrangler deploy` locally

blockers.description: Stripe live mode sk_live_ key not yet configured — billing in test mode only
blockers.workaround: Stripe test mode fully functional; live mode pending key with full permissions

human_actions_pending.action: Add CF_API_TOKEN to GitHub Actions secrets with Workers Edit permissions
human_actions_pending.context: Required to enable automated CI/CD deploy on push to main

human_actions_pending.action: Provide Stripe sk_live_ key with full permissions to enable live billing
human_actions_pending.context: Test mode is active and verified; live mode waiting on key

decisions.decision: Use ! non-null assertion in test files for .mock.calls[0]
decisions.rationale: Acceptable in test context where preceding setup guarantees the call

decisions.decision: Prefix unused cloud helpers with _ instead of deleting
decisions.rationale: ECDSA/XML SAML helpers are valid implementations worth retaining

decisions.decision: Deploy order: D1 migrations before Worker
decisions.rationale: Schema-first rollout avoids runtime errors on deploy

decisions.decision: D1 migration tracker recovery via manual INSERT
decisions.rationale: Partial apply left schema ahead of tracker; INSERT into d1_migrations resolves mismatch

decisions.decision: Stripe test mode products created first
decisions.rationale: Billing flow verified before committing to live keys

next_action: Milestone v2.0.0 is complete. Start /gsd:new-milestone for v2.1 or work from backlog. Pending human actions: set CF_API_TOKEN in GitHub Actions, provide sk_live_ Stripe key.
context_notes: v2.0.0 milestone complete. All 3 plans in phase 01-deploy-everything done. Cloud Worker live at kindlm.com, 13 D1 migrations applied, VS Code extension published. Two non-blocking human actions deferred.
